reviews.review_title: TOP TIER YOOOOOOOOOO, but fix pls
reviews.review_description: I really like the game, its a cool, fun, and engaging horror game, but what you need to fix the most is how the meat guy has a large range and it just makes it unfair when its around, so please can you fix that? Then i want you to add more accessories because its almost looking like a ghost town in the shop, it would also be more helpful to fix the monsters a little. Overall, its a good game thats fills my heart with joy. And also, i was wondering if you could add back the goop guy, because im a OG, there used to be no outside in the game until now.
